author: Testpress
description: SR Pharmacy is an online learning platform that offers easy-to-understand study material focused on pharmacy and the medical field. With over 100,000 students benefiting from its content and a YouTube channel boasting more than 150,000 subscribers, SR Pharmacy has quickly become a trusted name in the field. Known for its simple notes and clear teaching style, it has gained immense popularity among students and continues to grow across various social media platforms.
